fallback.title: Install DAD War Room
fallback.subtitle: Follow these steps to add the app to your device.
fallback.step1: Use your browser menu to install or add this site as an app.
fallback.step2: If you don't see an install option, try opening this site in Chrome or Edge.

ios-safari.title: Install on iPhone
ios-safari.subtitle: iOS doesn't expose an automatic install. Two taps and it's on your home screen.
ios-safari.step1: Tap the Share button in Safari (the square with an arrow at the bottom).
ios-safari.step3: Tap 'Add' in the top right — the app appears on your home screen.

mac-safari.title: Install on Mac
mac-safari.subtitle: Safari 17+ supports installing web apps to the Dock.
mac-safari.step1: From Safari's File menu, choose 'Add to Dock…'
mac-safari.step2: Confirm the name and icon, then click 'Add'.
mac-safari.step3: The app shows up in your Dock and Launchpad as a standalone window.

firefox.title: Install on Firefox
firefox.subtitle: Firefox doesn't install web apps natively on desktop. Open in Chrome or Edge for one-click install.
firefox.step1: On Android Firefox: tap the menu (three dots) → Install.
firefox.step2: On desktop: bookmark the page, or open it in Chrome / Edge to install.
